fields.summary: Anthropic is an AI research company focused on building reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. Their work centers on AI safety research including Constitutional AI, responsible scaling policies, and transparency initiatives. They offer the Claude family of AI models and provide developer resources through Anthropic Academy and tutorials.
fields.funding: not disclosed in the cited sources
fields.headcount: not disclosed in the cited sources
fields.recent_signal: The company publishes its Responsible Scaling Policy and Claude's Constitution as governance frameworks, maintains a Trust Center for security and compliance, and operates Anthropic Academy for developer education.
